name: Legendary Siren
description: Legendary Maliwan class mod for Maya the Siren. Built around Ward, Accelerate, Mind's Eye, Foresight, Flicker. Boosts cooldown rate and gun damage, with extra movement speed during Phaselock.
notes: Extra Phaselock duration from Suspension and Thoughtlock prolongs the movement-speed bonus, as it lasts for the full time Phaselock is active. A separate Legendary Siren item can be unlocked via a SHiFT code from the Diamond Plate Loot Chest. The model features Lilith's Phasewalk emblem, and the red text nods to one of Lilith's critical-hit voice lines from the original Borderlands.

special.description: At max level: +58% action skill cooldown rate, +42% gun damage. While Phaselock is active, Maya gains +45% movement speed. Possible skill bonuses (varies by roll): up to +5 Ward, +5 Accelerate, +5 Mind's Eye, +5 Foresight, +5 Flicker.
special.title: (giggles) I'm really good at this!

abilities: Increases Movement Speed by 457. while Phaselock is active.
